analysis.consistency: High. The description, type, and rarity align well. The mechanics clearly define charges, expenditure, spellcasting level scaling, recharge rate, and destruction condition.
analysis.quality: High. The description is comprehensive, detailing all necessary mechanical aspects (charges, save DC, mechanics of expenditure, recharge, and failure condition).

mechanics_check.action_cost: 1 or more charges to cast Fireball
mechanics_check.spell_scaling: 1 charge = 3rd-level Fireball; +1 charge per additional spell slot level increase
mechanics_check.destruction_condition: Roll d20 when last charge is expended; 1 results in destruction
mechanics_check.notes: The save DC (15) is hardcoded, which is standard for many magic items; this is a fixed mechanical value.
